Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); prices={x['symbol']:x['markPrice'] for x in d['data']}; print\('SOSO-USD:', prices.get\('SOSO-USD'\)\); print\('BTC-USD:', prices.get\('BTC-USD'\)\); print\('ETH-USD:', prices.get\('ETH-USD'\)\); print\('Total symbols:', len\(prices\)\); print\('Sample:', list\(prices.items\(\)\)[:5]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Version:',d['version'],'Count:',d['count']\); evm=[t for t in d['tools'] if t['id'].startswith\('get_evm'\)]; print\('EVM tools:',[t['id'] for t in evm]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['wallet_address'], 'id=',r['account_id']\) for r in d['data'][:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tx=d['data']['transactions']; print\('Count:',len\(tx\)\); print\(json.dumps\(tx[0],indent=2\) if tx else 'none'\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d['data']['transfers']; print\('Count:',len\(t\)\); print\(json.dumps\(t[0],indent=2\) if t else 'none'\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); bals=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('spotBalance',[]\); print\('SpotBalance items:',len\(bals\)\); [print\(b\) for b in bals[:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); syms=d.get\('data'\) or []; print\('Total symbols:',len\(syms\)\); relevant=[s for s in syms if 'SOSO' in \(s.get\('symbol'\) or ''\) or 'ssi' in \(s.get\('symbol'\) or ''\).lower\(\)][:10]; [print\(s.get\('symbol'\),'base=',s.get\('baseCoin'\)\) for s in relevant]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); syms=d.get\('data'\) or []; relevant=[s for s in syms if 'MAG7' in \(s.get\('symbol'\) or ''\).upper\(\) or 'SSI' in \(s.get\('symbol'\) or ''\).upper\(\) or 'SOSO' in \(s.get\('symbol'\) or ''\).upper\(\)]; [print\(s.get\('symbol'\),'lastPx=',s.get\('lastPx'\)\) for s in relevant]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('Total USD:',d['total_usd']\); print\('sSOSO:',d['staked'][0]['amount'],'@',d['staked'][0]['price'],'=',d['staked'][0]['usd']\); print\('LP vault:',d['lp_vaults'][0]['symbol'],d['lp_vaults'][0]['amount'],'@',d['lp_vaults'][0]['price'],'=',d['lp_vaults'][0]['usd']\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('Total:',d['balance']\); print\('Breakdown:',d['breakdown']\); print\('sSOSO price:',d['evm']['native']['price']\)")
